reasoning: Tech leadership driving premarket risk-on rotation. XLK +1.79% significantly outperforming SPY +0.43%, supported by XLE +0.83% and XLF +0.45%. All sectors aligned to the upside despite overnight -4.14 gap down, indicating sector breadth recovery into open. However, narrow tech dominance (XLK outperforming by 136bps) suggests strength may be concentrated in mega-cap growth rather than broad market participation. VIX rising +6.26% to HIGH regime adds caution against overextending bias.
key_observations: XLK +1.79%: Strong tech leadership, significantly outperforming SPY
XLF +0.45% + XLE +0.83%: Sector participation confirms risk-on, but muted relative to tech
Overall rotation: Clear risk-on from gap-down recovery with all sectors positive; narrow tech-led move
